name: rootlens-dashboard-v1
title: brainstorm: RootLens dashboard v1
creator: elebirds
notes: Implemented foundation-first RootLens Dashboard v1. Added dashboard bootstrap API, rootlens session store compatibility, dashboard-friendly run detail fields, review target contract, extended feedback API, React + TypeScript + Vite web skeleton, API client/state model, upload/history/detail/provenance/review UI, tests, and docs. Verification passed: uv run --extra dev pytest (162 passed), ruff, mypy, run_examples, npm run typecheck, npm run build.
